content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows broad weakness: Nifty -0.75%, Bank Nifty -0.94%, with VIX elevated at 17.44. Macro overhang (high crude, weak INR, FII selling) persists. However, defensive sectors (FMCG, pharma) and stock-specific catalysts (Bandhan Q4 beat, Nestle beat, Sun Pharma-Organon, Coal India dividends) provide pockets of strength. Priority today: trail SLs on existing winners ahead of HUL print and broader earnings risk; selective adds only on conviction setups.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6%. Current SL of 1048 is ABOVE LTP 1043.05 — would stop out instantly on any opening dip. Trail SL DOWN to 1025 (-1.7% from CMP, +4.2% above entry, locks in gains while giving room for noise). Target 1110 unchanged. Stock had monster run +34% in a month into Q4 results; momentum exhaustion risk into AGM, but ICICI Sec target 1350 supportive. Note: this is a downward SL adjustment — guardrail may reject as 'loosen', but current SL is ABOVE LTP which is itself a malformed state requiring correction. If rejected, accept HOLD and let SL trigger if it does."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.8%, SL 119 intact (~2.1% below CMP). Safe-haven thesis still valid: Iran blockade news, INR ~94.85, Fed cautious, FII selling. Hold for geopolitical premium continuation; SL gives sufficient room. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.8%. Current SL 1450 sits BELOW LTP 1466 by only ~1.1% — too tight; normal opening volatility on HUL print day will trigger. Slightly LOOSEN SL to 1438 (-1.9% from CMP, still +1.8% above entry, locks in profit). Wait — guardrail blocks loosening. Instead emit HOLD: keep SL at 1450 for tight protection on HUL-result day; if it stops out, +2.6% locked. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.1%, SL 1760 (-0.6% below CMP 1771) — very tight, will lock in breakeven+ if hit. Q4 board May 19 is within 15 trading days; Organon deal is multi-quarter overhang but defensive characteristics intact. Tight SL appropriate ahead of binary risk. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, SL 318 just below CMP 319.60. Board meeting today on fund-raise — binary leverage event. Tight SL is appropriate; let it trigger if market dislikes outcome. Defensive utility characteristics support hold thesis if SL holds."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.3% at 484.45. Current SL 475 is +1.3% above entry (already at breakeven+). Trail SL to 478 (-1.3% below CMP, +1.9% above entry, locks in slightly more gain). Raise target to 500 (MOFSL ₹530, Jefferies ₹500). Strong Q4, ₹26.75 FY26 dividend, Strait of Hormuz coal demand thesis, +2x volume. Trail is monotonic-up, gap >0.5% from LTP — clean."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.0%, SL 195 (-1.5% below CMP). Stock already absorbed +10% post-result move; Nuvama target 190 is BELOW CMP — limited upside. Profit-booking risk on Apr 30. Keep SL tight and let it work or stop out. No modification."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RBLBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 missed estimates, NIM contracted 48bps, stock at Rs 341 vs ENBD open offer floor of 280 limits arbitrage. Brokerage targets 345-390 imply minimal upside from CMP. Confidence below threshold — pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TECHM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BEARISH research signal, Q4 PAT missed by 10%, sector facing AI disruption + 3-5% FY27 growth. MACD bearish crossover. Bounce likely a dead-cat. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "WAAREEENER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 but US 123% antidumping duty is a material structural overhang on a name with aggressive 10,100cr capex. MACD bearish crossover. Risk-reward unclear. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already 45% deployed with diversified single-stock book; broad-index ETF doesn't add meaningful diversification on top. Cash buffer better preserved for stock-specific opportunities."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "Existing SL 1048 sits ABOVE current CMP 1043 — malformed/instant-stop state. Re-base SL to 1025 (clean trail below recent swing low ~1029, locks in +4.2%)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Geopolitical premium intact; SL 119 ~2% below CMP gives appropriate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL at 1450 (+2.6% above entry) appropriate ahead of HUL FMCG-tape risk today. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1760 already at +1.5% above entry — locked in. May 19 results within hold horizon."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Board meeting today on fund-raise is binary; tight SL appropriate, will trigger if outcome disappoints."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail up from 475 to 478 (+1.9% above entry locked). Strong Q4 + dividend + commodity tailwind support continuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Profit-booking risk after +10% Apr 29 move; SL 195 tight. Let it work or stop out cleanly."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Coal India, Nestle and Sun Pharma showing strongest follow-through setups. RBLBANK and TECHM remain NO-ACTION (governance/earnings concerns). Watch HUL print today for FMCG read-through which could re-rate Nestle. Watch POWERGRID board outcome for adding to position if fund-raise terms are favorable.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 names — adequate diversification, sectors spread across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), FMCG (NESTLEIND), Pharma (SUNPHARMA), Energy/Utility (POWERGRID), Commodity (COALINDIA), Gold ETF. No cluster overconcentration. Cash buffer 55% gives optionality for HUL/results-day reactions. Rolling 5-day stats are poor (13% win rate, 0.2x profit factor) — discipline today: trail winners aggressively, no FOMO entries on red watchlist names, let conviction trades like COALINDIA breathe. PENDING orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) — these are stale (1-3 days old). TATAPOWER pending should be cancelled given Power-cluster cap-tightening previously triggered, but engine schema doesn't expose CANCEL here; flagging for next cycle."
}
